task.ProtocolImaging.label: 📷Base Panorama Capture
task.ProtocolImaging.description: Automatically capture a top-down view of the base and stitch it into a panorama. Must be in the base scene.
task.ProtocolImaging.option.ProtocolImag: Grid dimensions for capture. Larger grids cover more area but take longer.
Use Gaussian feathered blending for stitching to reduce visible seams
